# Seoul BD Dental Clinic (서울비디치과)

> Comprehensive dental care center in Cheonan, South Korea. 365 days open, 15 Seoul National University-trained dentists. Specializing in implants, Invisalign, Glownate aesthetic dentistry, pediatric dental care, and sedation dentistry for patients with dental anxiety.

## Quick Facts

- **Official Name**: 서울비디치과 (Seoul BD Dental Clinic)
- **Business Name**: 불당본점서울비디치과의원
- **Business Registration**: 228-11-02956
- **Representative**: 현정민 외 2명
- **Founded**: 2021.05.24 (Buldang branch)
- **Address**: 충남 천안시 서북구 불당34길 14, 1~5층 (5-story building, 400 pyeong / 1,320 m²)
- **Phone**: 041-415-2892
- **Website**: https://bdbddc.com
- **Instagram**: https://www.instagram.com/seoul_bddc
- **Naver Blog**: https://blog.naver.com/dentbusik
- **YouTube**: https://www.youtube.com/@BDtube
- **KakaoTalk**: https://pf.kakao.com/_Cxivlxb
- **Hours**: Mon–Sat 09:00–20:00 (lunch 12:30–14:00), Sun 09:00–17:00, Holidays 09:00–13:00 (365 days)

## About

Seoul BD Dental Clinic (서울비디치과) is a large-scale dental center in Buldang-dong, Cheonan, South Korea. Founded by Dr. Moon Seok-Jun (문석준), the clinic operates across a 400-pyeong (1,320 m²) 5-story building with 6 independent surgical suites, 2 recovery rooms, and an air-shower infection control system equivalent to Seoul National University Dental Hospital standards.

BD stands for "Best Dedication" — the clinic's core philosophy is "필요한 진료를 받지 못하는 사람이 없도록 하자" (No one should miss the dental care they need). The practice is built on transparent pricing, no unnecessary treatments, and patient-first care.

## Leadership

- **문석준 (Moon Seok-Jun)** — 대표원장 (Founding Director). Seoul National University College of Dentistry, SNU Graduate School of Dentistry (Master's). Known as "치과겁통령" — dental anxiety specialist who helps fearful patients overcome their dental phobia. YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@geoptongryung
- **김민수 (Kim Min-Su)** — 대표원장. Seoul National University. Board-certified in Integrated Dentistry (통합치의학과 전문의).
- **현정민 (Hyun Jung-Min)** — 대표원장. Seoul National University. Board-certified in Integrated Dentistry (통합치의학과 전문의).

## Key Differentiators

1. **15 SNU Dentists**: All dentists trained at Seoul National University, Korea's #1 dental school
2. **6 Surgical Suites**: Dedicated implant operating rooms with hospital-grade infection control
3. **3 Pediatric Specialists**: Board-certified pediatric dentists for children's dental care
4. **365-Day Operation**: Open every day including weekends and holidays
5. **Air-Shower System**: Hospital-grade infection control equivalent to university dental hospitals
6. **치과겁통령 Program**: Specialized anxiety management for patients with dental phobia

## Core Treatments

### Implant Center (임플란트센터)
Navigation-guided implants, sleep sedation implants, full-mouth rehabilitation, bone grafting, sinus lifts. 6 dedicated surgical rooms.
- URL: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant

### Invisalign Center (인비절라인 교정센터)
Certified Invisalign provider. Clear aligner orthodontic treatment for adults and teens.
- URL: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/invisalign

### Glownate Aesthetic Center (글로우네이트 심미센터)
Proprietary aesthetic dental treatment (laminate/veneer) for smile design.
- URL: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/glownate

### Pediatric Center (소아치과센터)
3 board-certified pediatric dentists. Nitrous oxide and sleep sedation for children.
- URL: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/pediatric

### Sedation Dentistry (수면치료)
IV sedation and nitrous oxide for patients with dental anxiety.
- URL: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/sedation

### Orthodontics (치아교정)
Comprehensive orthodontic treatment including bracket-based and clear aligner options.
- URL: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/orthodontics

### Implant Sub-Treatments (임플란트 세부)
- Navigation implant (네비게이션): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-navigation
- Sedation implant (수면 임플란트): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-sedation
- Advanced/Bone graft (고난도·뼈이식): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-advanced
- Flapless/Non-incision (비절개): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-flapless
- Full-mouth (전악): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-full-mouth
- Immediate placement (발치즉시): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-immediate
- Immediate loading (즉시로딩): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-immediate-loading
- All-on-4/6 hybrid (올온4·올온6): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-hybrid
- Overdenture (임플란트 틀니): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-overdenture
- Revision (재수술): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-revision
- Sinus lift (상악동거상술): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-sinus-lift
- Holiday implant (공휴일·365일): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/implant-holiday

### Invisalign Sub-Programs (인비절라인 프로그램별)
- Comprehensive/Best (컴프리헨시브): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/invisalign-best
- Moderate (모더레이트): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/invisalign-moderate
- Light (라이트): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/invisalign-light
- Express (익스프레스): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/invisalign-express
- First/Kids (퍼스트·어린이): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/invisalign-first

### Bracket Orthodontics Sub-Programs (브라켓교정 프로그램별)
- Comprehensive/Best (컴프리헨시브): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/ortho-best
- Moderate (모더레이트): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/ortho-moderate
- Light (라이트): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/ortho-light
- Express (익스프레스): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/ortho-express
- First/Kids (퍼스트·어린이): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/ortho-first
- Clippy-C (클리피씨 자가결찰): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/orthodontic-clippy-c
- Clarity Ultra (클라리티울트라 세라믹): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/orthodontic-clarity-ultra

### Aesthetic Dentistry (심미치료)
- Aesthetic/Laminate (심미레진·라미네이트): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/aesthetic
- Whitening (미백): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/whitening
- Resin bonding (레진치료): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/resin

### Restorative Dentistry (보존치료)
- Cavity (충치): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/cavity
- Crown (크라운): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/crown
- Inlay/Onlay (인레이): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/inlay
- Root canal (신경치료): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/root-canal
- Re-root canal (재신경치료): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/re-root-canal
- Bridge (브릿지): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/bridge
- Denture (틀니): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/denture

### Periodontal & Surgical (잇몸·외과)
- Scaling (스케일링): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/scaling
- Gum disease (잇몸치료): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/gum
- Periodontitis (치주염): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/periodontitis
- Gum surgery (잇몸수술): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/gum-surgery
- Wisdom tooth (사랑니): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/wisdom-tooth
- Apicoectomy (치근단절제술): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/apicoectomy

### Preventive & Specialty (예방·특수)
- Prevention (예방진료): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/prevention
- TMJ disorder (턱관절): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/tmj
- Bruxism (이갈이): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/bruxism
- Emergency dental (응급치과): https://bdbddc.com/treatments/emergency
- All treatments: https://bdbddc.com/treatments/

## Before/After Treatment Cases (치료 사례 · 비포/애프터)

Seoul BD Dental publishes verified before-and-after treatment photos so prospective patients can see real clinical outcomes. The gallery covers implants, Invisalign (clear aligners), Glownate (laminate veneers), orthodontics, and whitening. Each case includes the treatment category, treating doctor, patient age/gender, treatment duration, and curtain-slider comparison images.

- Before/After Hub (6 featured cases): https://bdbddc.com/cases/
- Full Gallery (dynamic, filterable): https://bdbddc.com/cases/gallery
  - Filter by: Implant, Invisalign, Glownate (Laminate), Orthodontics, Whitening, General
  - Glownate sub-filters: 하얗고 예쁘게 (Bright White), 밝고 예쁘게 (Light & Pretty), 자연스럽고 예쁘게 (Natural & Pretty)
- Note: Full after-photos require free login (patient privacy protection)

### FAQ — Treatment Cases
- Q: Can I see implant before/after photos? → Yes. Multiple implant cases including sinus lifts and bone grafts are shown in the gallery.
- Q: Are Invisalign results available? → Yes. Clear aligner orthodontic cases with before/after comparison.
- Q: What is Glownate? → Glownate is Seoul BD Dental's proprietary laminate veneer brand. Before/after photos are available filtered by style preference.
- Q: Do I need to log in? → Before photos are public. Full after-photo access requires free membership (patient privacy).

## Doctor Columns & Blog (원장 컬럼 · 블로그)

The clinic's dentists write educational columns covering dental health topics, treatment guides, and patient Q&A. Content is published via InBlog and accessible through the website. Topics include implant care, Invisalign tips, Glownate aftercare, orthodontic guides, pediatric dental advice, and sedation dentistry information.

- Blog / Column Hub: https://bdbddc.com/blog/
- Column Redirect: https://bdbddc.com/column/ (redirects to /blog/)
- Categories: Implant, Invisalign, Glownate, Orthodontics, Pediatric, Sedation, General Dental Care

### FAQ — Columns
- Q: Who writes the columns? → Seoul BD Dental's 15 SNU-trained dentists author the articles based on their clinical expertise.
- Q: How often are new columns published? → New articles are published regularly, covering seasonal dental topics and treatment advances.

## Careers (채용)
- Careers Page: https://bdbddc.com/careers
- Benefits: 주4일제 기본 (입사 첫날부터), 투명한 인센티브 기준 공개, 서울대 전문의 협진 시스템
- Positions: 진료실 치과위생사, 상담팀 치과위생사 (경력 무관 상시 채용)

## International Patients (해외환자)

Seoul BD Dental offers a **Glownate 1-Night 2-Day Premium Package** for international patients from Japan and China — with NO broker fees.

### Glownate Premium Package Includes:
1. **Glownate 8-tooth veneer treatment** by Dr. Hyun Jung-Min (creator of Glownate technique)
2. **Shilla Stay Cheonan 1 night** — complimentary hotel stay
3. **KTX Cheonan-Asan Station pickup & drop-off** — coordinator accompanies
4. **Cheonan sightseeing tour** — Byeongcheon Sundae (Korea's #1 sundae soup), Toujours Bakery (top-tier), Independence Hall, Walnut Cakes
5. **2 meals provided** — lunch & dinner
6. **Cheonan 1-Day Travel Guide PDF** — free digital guide

### Key Message:
- **No broker/agency fees** — same price as Korean patients
- Regular brokers charge 20–40% commission on top of treatment fees
- BD Dental direct booking = same treatment + full package included

### International Landing Pages:
- 🇯🇵 Japanese (Glownate): https://bdbddc.com/jp/
- 🇨🇳 Chinese (Glownate): https://bdbddc.com/cn/
- 🇺🇸 English: https://bdbddc.com/en/
- 🇻🇳 Vietnamese: https://bdbddc.com/vi/
- 🇹🇭 Thai: https://bdbddc.com/th/
- 🇷🇺 Russian: https://bdbddc.com/ru/
- Contact: LINE (Japan), WeChat (China), KakaoTalk, or reservation form on each page

### Multilingual Treatment Pages:
- 🇺🇸 English: /en/ (dental), /en/implant.html, /en/invisalign.html, /en/laminate.html
- 🇻🇳 Vietnamese: /vi/ (dental), /vi/implant.html, /vi/invisalign.html, /vi/laminate.html
- 🇯🇵 Japanese: /jp/dental.html, /jp/implant.html, /jp/invisalign.html (+ /jp/ Glownate)
- 🇨🇳 Chinese: /cn/dental.html, /cn/implant.html, /cn/invisalign.html (+ /cn/ Glownate)
- 🇹🇭 Thai: /th/ (dental overview)
- 🇷🇺 Russian: /ru/ (dental overview)

## Service Areas
Primary: Cheonan (천안), Asan (아산), Buldang-dong (불당동)
Extended: Sejong (세종), Daejeon (대전), Cheongju (청주), Pyeongtaek (평택), Anseong (안성), Chungju (충주), and 20+ additional regions
- Area pages: https://bdbddc.com/area/{region-name}

## Detailed Information
For comprehensive information including treatment details, pricing, FAQ, and medical team profiles, see: https://bdbddc.com/llms-full.txt
